visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden or the represented countries on Business, you need the documents as per below checklist.
Business Visa (TR) - Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6hf0OI9PU7jZeKMR2oTbvn/4877a285baf43f06e36bb4e95c0c2e3c/Business-Visa-TR-Checklist-1.pdf)
Political, scientific, cultural, sports or religious events or other reason- Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7JcZWms2TeZ5mfFJLKAcII/53a9644ffefb2fe554ebe0372a8e776f/Other-Reason-Checklist-1.pdf)
Medical Reason-Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3PEmOmiLr1G17lliCTqPFX/9223c3a2e42f87a0665409f25afe2b59/Medical-Reason-Checklist-1.pdf)

English - Application for Schengen Visa or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Medical travel insurance:
Visa applicants are required to have medical travel insurance. It must cover any costs that may be incurred in connection with emergency medical aid, urgent hospital treatment or transport to the country of origin for medical reasons or in the event of death. The insurance has to cover the intended period of stay in the Schengen area according to article 15 and article 24, Schengen visa Code 810/2009.
Applicants for Schengen visa are required to submit an adequate and valid travel insurance to cover any expenses that might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention and/or emergency hospital treatment.
The minimum coverage should be EUR 30,000.00.
The insurance may be purchased in Bangladesh or abroad.
The proof of insurance has to be submitted upon application.
The insurance must cover the entire period of stay and be valid throughout the territory of all the Schengen states.
All applicants that have been granted multiple entry visas are required to be in possession of a medical travel insurance for every subsequent visit to Schengen territory within the duration of the multiple entry visa.
Exempted from the medical insurance requirement are those who:
- Travel with a diplomatic passport
- Travel with an official passport for official reasons with a Note Verbal
- Apply for an airport transit visa
- Are relatives of an EU citizen exercising their right to free movement, i.e. his/her husband or wife, registered partner, common law spouse, children under 21 years of age, older children who are financially dependent on their parents living in the Schengen area and parents who are financially dependent on their children living in the Schengen area.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[swe > bgd > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]

Some categories of applicant may be exempted from paying the visa fee, for information regarding this please contact the Embassy by e-mail : migration.dhaka@gov.se (mailto:migration.dhaka@gov.se).
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of BDT 1573 that is equivalent to 11.00 euro (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application added to the visa/application fee.
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at the NRB bank booth in the Sweden Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 230/- Taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 2]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT)
- Fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time: The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 15 Calendar days, but may in some cases take up to 45 calendar days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden or any of the countries represented by the Embassy of Sweden in Dhaka, Dhaka for a maximum of 3 months for business purposes. Please note that if you are going to work for a period less than 3 month you will need both a work permit and a Schengen visa and if that is the case you should contact the Embassy of Sweden for consultation.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
The process and required documents are the same for all the countries that the Embassy of Sweden represents (Finland, Iceland, Latvia, Luxembourg and Slovenia).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden or any of the countries represented by the Embassy of Sweden in Dhaka, Dhaka for a maximum of 3 months for business purposes. Please note that if you are going to work for a period less than 3 month you will need both a work permit and a Schengen visa and if that is the case you should contact the Embassy of Sweden for consultation.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
The process and required documents are the same for all the countries that the Embassy of Sweden represents (Finland, Iceland, Latvia, Luxembourg and Slovenia).

## Visa Fees

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]

Some categories of applicant may be exempted from paying the visa fee, for information regarding this please contact the Embassy by e-mail : migration.dhaka@gov.se (mailto:migration.dhaka@gov.se).
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of BDT 1573 that is equivalent to 11.00 euro (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application added to the visa/application fee.
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at the NRB bank booth in the Sweden Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 230/- Taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 2]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT)
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden or the represented countries on Business, you need the documents as per below checklist.
Business Visa (TR) - Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6hf0OI9PU7jZeKMR2oTbvn/4877a285baf43f06e36bb4e95c0c2e3c/Business-Visa-TR-Checklist-1.pdf)
Political, scientific, cultural, sports or religious events or other reason- Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7JcZWms2TeZ5mfFJLKAcII/53a9644ffefb2fe554ebe0372a8e776f/Other-Reason-Checklist-1.pdf)
Medical Reason-Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3PEmOmiLr1G17lliCTqPFX/9223c3a2e42f87a0665409f25afe2b59/Medical-Reason-Checklist-1.pdf)

English - Application for Schengen Visa or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Medical travel insurance:
Visa applicants are required to have medical travel insurance. It must cover any costs that may be incurred in connection with emergency medical aid, urgent hospital treatment or transport to the country of origin for medical reasons or in the event of death. The insurance has to cover the intended period of stay in the Schengen area according to article 15 and article 24, Schengen visa Code 810/2009.
Applicants for Schengen visa are required to submit an adequate and valid travel insurance to cover any expenses that might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention and/or emergency hospital treatment.
The minimum coverage should be EUR 30,000.00.
The insurance may be purchased in Bangladesh or abroad.
The proof of insurance has to be submitted upon application.
The insurance must cover the entire period of stay and be valid throughout the territory of all the Schengen states.
All applicants that have been granted multiple entry visas are required to be in possession of a medical travel insurance for every subsequent visit to Schengen territory within the duration of the multiple entry visa.
Exempted from the medical insurance requirement are those who:
- Travel with a diplomatic passport
- Travel with an official passport for official reasons with a Note Verbal
- Apply for an airport transit visa
- Are relatives of an EU citizen exercising their right to free movement, i.e. his/her husband or wife, registered partner, common law spouse, children under 21 years of age, older children who are financially dependent on their parents living in the Schengen area and parents who are financially dependent on their children living in the Schengen area.

## Photo Specifications
One [1] photograph of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:

- colour photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.
- The photograph should not be older than 6 months old.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 15 Calendar days, but may in some cases take up to 45 calendar days.

## Download Form
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6UtBJaKdcztJVAUJzjygdG/986c6238b77ca23e7564df51831da187/application-for-schengen-visa__3_.pdf)
Please note: 
- Click on the above Application Form.
- When the Form opens, save it on your computer.
- Fill the Application Form by Computer instead of hand writing
- The Form must be printed back-to-back.

visa_types.name: Official Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden or the represented countries on official purpose, you need the documents as per below checklist
Official visit Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1W31PwG4YAEz4zJ8leOg4c/f6591cd2b476ad35d16f9198dd005dbe/Official-Visit-Checklist-1.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden or any of the countries represented by the Embassy of Sweden in Dhaka, Dhaka for a maximum of 3 months for official purposes.
According to Schengen regulation (Handbook of Visa Code) article 7.10 it is the applicant who needs to submit the necessary documents to be granted a visa and the Embassy does not need to make further investigation into an application if the documentation is not sufficient. Failure to submit the required documents will lead to a refusal of the application
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
The process and required documents are the same for all the countries that the Embassy of Sweden represents (Finland, Iceland, Latvia, Luxembourg and Slovenia).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Sweden or any of the countries represented by the Embassy of Sweden in Dhaka, Dhaka for a maximum of 3 months for official purposes.
According to Schengen regulation (Handbook of Visa Code) article 7.10 it is the applicant who needs to submit the necessary documents to be granted a visa and the Embassy does not need to make further investigation into an application if the documentation is not sufficient. Failure to submit the required documents will lead to a refusal of the application
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
The process and required documents are the same for all the countries that the Embassy of Sweden represents (Finland, Iceland, Latvia, Luxembourg and Slovenia).

## Visa Fees
Visa fees is waived for the applicant who has Official or Diplomatic passport and Note Verbal from MOFA.
Some categories of applicant may be exempted from paying the visa fee, for information regarding this please contact the Embassy by e-mail : migration.dhaka@gov.se (mailto:migration.dhaka@gov.se).
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of BDT 1573 that is equivalent to 11.00 euro (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application added to the visa/application fee.
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at the NRB bank booth in the Sweden Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 230/- Taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Official Visa > Visa Fees 1]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT)
- Fees are non-refundable.

Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6UtBJaKdcztJVAUJzjygdG/986c6238b77ca23e7564df51831da187/application-for-schengen-visa__3_.pdf)
Please note: 
- Click on the above Application Form.
- When the Form opens, save it on your computer.
- Fill the Application Form by Computer instead of hand writing
- The Form must be printed back-to-back.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants for a seaman’s visa must be employed in any capacity on board a vessel, and seeking to enter Sweden or any of the countries represented by the embassy of Sweden solely in pursuit of his/her calling as a seaman, with the intention of departing with the vessel or reshipping on other vessel that is bound for a foreign port or place or one coming to the Sweden or any of the countries represented by the embassy of Sweden to join a vessel in this country.
The process and required documents are the same for all the countries that the Embassy of Sweden represents (Finland, Iceland, Latvia, Luxembourg and Slovenia).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants for a seaman’s visa must be employed in any capacity on board a vessel, and seeking to enter Sweden or any of the countries represented by the embassy of Sweden solely in pursuit of his/her calling as a seaman, with the intention of departing with the vessel or reshipping on other vessel that is bound for a foreign port or place or one coming to the Sweden or any of the countries represented by the embassy of Sweden to join a vessel in this country.
The process and required documents are the same for all the countries that the Embassy of Sweden represents (Finland, Iceland, Latvia, Luxembourg and Slovenia).

## Visa Fees

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Seamen Transit Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Some categories of applicant may be exempted from paying the visa fee, for information regarding this please contact the Embassy by e-mail : migration.dhaka@gov.se (mailto:migration.dhaka@gov.se).
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of BDT 1573 that is equivalent to 11.00 euro (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application added to the visa/application fee.
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at the NRB bank booth in the Sweden Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 230/- Taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Seamen Transit Visa > Visa Fees 2]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT)
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
If you apply for visa to visit Sweden or any of the represented countries for Seamen, you need the documents as per below checklist. For Seafarer, Application can be submitted nine (09)
                                                                        months in advance to the travel start date.
Seamen Transit Visa - Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3sx1b5pXUpjjisFQAUkGwZ/21377bbeb73980f9f0f534ae379c0ee6/Seamen-Transit-Visa-Checklist-1.pdf)
English - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6mVFMuxKgZT0s1GiqkpgUb/05c65254111e2f4d2005f9aedf5d35d2/English-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf) or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf) - - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

## Photo Specifications
One [1] photograph of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:

- colour photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.
- The photograph should not be older than 6 months old.

## Processing Time
The processing at the Embassy of Sweden normally takes 15 Calendar days, but may in some cases take up to 45 calendar days..

## Download Form
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6UtBJaKdcztJVAUJzjygdG/986c6238b77ca23e7564df51831da187/application-for-schengen-visa__3_.pdf)
Please note: 
- Click on the above Application Form.
- When the Form opens, save it on your computer.
- Fill the Application Form by Computer instead of hand writing
- The Form must be printed back-to-back.

visa_types.name: Visiting Family And Friends
visa_types.documents_required:
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden or the represented countries on Visiting Family and Friends, you need the documents as per below checklist.
Visiting Family or Friends Visa - Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1zM8NHXzY9pMAZ22MIRW4P/6e8ec98855919973874b1b2cee2d34d4/Visiting-Family-or-Friends-Visa-Checklist-1.pdf) 
English - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6mVFMuxKgZT0s1GiqkpgUb/05c65254111e2f4d2005f9aedf5d35d2/English-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf) or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf) - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting. 

Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Medical travel insurance:
Visa applicants are required to have medical travel insurance. It must cover any costs that may be incurred in connection with emergency medical aid, urgent hospital treatment or transport to the country of origin for medical reasons or in the event of death. The insurance has to cover the intended period of stay in the Schengen area according to article 15 and article 24, Schengen visa Code 810/2009.
Applicants for Schengen visa are required to submit an adequate and valid travel insurance to cover any expenses that might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention and/or emergency hospital treatment.
The minimum coverage should be EUR 30,000.00.
The insurance may be purchased in Bangladesh or abroad.
The proof of insurance has to be submitted upon application.
The insurance must cover the entire period of stay and be valid throughout the territory of all the Schengen states.
All applicants that have been granted multiple entry visas are required to be in possession of a medical travel insurance for every subsequent visit to Schengen territory within the duration of the multiple entry visa.
Exempted from the medical insurance requirement are those who:
Travel with a diplomatic passport
Travel with an official passport for official reasons with a Note Verbal
Apply for an airport transit visa
Are relatives of an EU citizen exercising their right to free movement, i.e. his/her husband or wife, registered partner, common law spouse, children under 21 years of age, older children who are financially dependent on their parents living in the Schengen area and parents who are financially dependent on their children living in the Schengen area.

Some categories of applicant may be exempted from paying the visa fee, for information regarding this please contact the Embassy by e-mail : migration.dhaka@gov.se (mailto:migration.dhaka@gov.se).
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of BDT 1573 that is equivalent to 11.00 euro (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at the NRB bank booth in the Sweden Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 230/- Taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Visiting Family And Friends > Visa Fees 2]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT)
- Fees are non-refundable.

Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to apply for a visa to visit relatives and friends.
The Swedish Embassy in Dhaka also represents Finland, Iceland, Slovenia, Latvia and Luxembourg in visa matters. The process and required documents are the same as when applying for a Sweden/ Schengen visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing to apply for a visa to visit relatives and friends.
The Swedish Embassy in Dhaka also represents Finland, Iceland, Slovenia, Latvia and Luxembourg in visa matters. The process and required documents are the same as when applying for a Sweden/ Schengen visa.

## Visa Fees

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Visiting Family And Friends > Visa Fees 1]
Some categories of applicant may be exempted from paying the visa fee, for information regarding this please contact the Embassy by e-mail : migration.dhaka@gov.se (mailto:migration.dhaka@gov.se).
The visa fee is subject to change without notice.
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of BDT 1573 that is equivalent to 11.00 euro (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at the NRB bank booth in the Sweden Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 230/- Taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Visiting Family And Friends > Visa Fees 2]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT)
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden or the represented countries on Visiting Family and Friends, you need the documents as per below checklist.
Visiting Family or Friends Visa - Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1zM8NHXzY9pMAZ22MIRW4P/6e8ec98855919973874b1b2cee2d34d4/Visiting-Family-or-Friends-Visa-Checklist-1.pdf) 
English - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6mVFMuxKgZT0s1GiqkpgUb/05c65254111e2f4d2005f9aedf5d35d2/English-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf) or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf) - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting. 

Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Medical travel insurance:
Visa applicants are required to have medical travel insurance. It must cover any costs that may be incurred in connection with emergency medical aid, urgent hospital treatment or transport to the country of origin for medical reasons or in the event of death. The insurance has to cover the intended period of stay in the Schengen area according to article 15 and article 24, Schengen visa Code 810/2009.
Applicants for Schengen visa are required to submit an adequate and valid travel insurance to cover any expenses that might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention and/or emergency hospital treatment.
The minimum coverage should be EUR 30,000.00.
The insurance may be purchased in Bangladesh or abroad.
The proof of insurance has to be submitted upon application.
The insurance must cover the entire period of stay and be valid throughout the territory of all the Schengen states.
All applicants that have been granted multiple entry visas are required to be in possession of a medical travel insurance for every subsequent visit to Schengen territory within the duration of the multiple entry visa.
Exempted from the medical insurance requirement are those who:
Travel with a diplomatic passport
Travel with an official passport for official reasons with a Note Verbal
Apply for an airport transit visa
Are relatives of an EU citizen exercising their right to free movement, i.e. his/her husband or wife, registered partner, common law spouse, children under 21 years of age, older children who are financially dependent on their parents living in the Schengen area and parents who are financially dependent on their children living in the Schengen area.

## Photo Specifications
One [1] photograph of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:

- colour photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.
- The photograph should not be older than 6 months old.

## Processing Time
Processing normally takes 15 Calendar days, but may in some cases take up to a 45 calendar days.

## Download Form
Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6UtBJaKdcztJVAUJzjygdG/986c6238b77ca23e7564df51831da187/application-for-schengen-visa__3_.pdf)
Referee appendix- invitation (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3033z0AJ6nXrQl8eHLEaAn/47c1cc78783f6d4de6ce8bb78f4e6d81/invitation-form-for-schengen-visa.pdf)
Please note: 
- Click on the above Application Form.
- When the Form opens, save it on your computer.
- Fill the Application Form by Computer instead of hand writing
- The Form must be printed back-to-back.

An airport transit visa is applicable to some nationalities who are just transiting the Schengen territory and will not leave the transit area of the airport.
The process and required documents are the same for all the countries that the Embassy of Sweden represents (Finland, Iceland, Latvia, Luxembourg and Slovenia).

To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

## Photo Specifications

visa_types.overview:
Overview
As a family member of an EU/EEA citizen exercising their right of free movement in accordance with Directive 2004/38/EC you have the right to travel to the EU/EEA area together with your family or join to them in the area either to settle there or to travel there for a shorter visit. For more information please click here (https://www.swedenabroad.se/en/about-sweden-non-swedish-citizens/bangladesh/going-to-sweden/visiting-sweden/information-for-eueea-family-members/)
The Swedish Embassy in Dhaka also represents Finland, Iceland, Slovenia, Latvia and Luxembourg in visa matters. The process and required documents are the same as when applying for a Sweden/ Schengen visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
As a family member of an EU/EEA citizen exercising their right of free movement in accordance with Directive 2004/38/EC you have the right to travel to the EU/EEA area together with your family or join to them in the area either to settle there or to travel there for a shorter visit. For more information please click here (https://www.swedenabroad.se/en/about-sweden-non-swedish-citizens/bangladesh/going-to-sweden/visiting-sweden/information-for-eueea-family-members/)
The Swedish Embassy in Dhaka also represents Finland, Iceland, Slovenia, Latvia and Luxembourg in visa matters. The process and required documents are the same as when applying for a Sweden/ Schengen visa.

## Visa Fees
Family members of EU/EEA citizen’s category is exempted from the visa fee.
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of BDT 1573 that is equivalent to 11.00 euro (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
- The Visa fee will be paid in cash at the NRB bank booth in the Sweden Visa Application Centre, Dhaka with nominal fee of 230/- Taka inclusive of VAT as payment processing fee.
- The visa application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:

[swe > bgd > en > Table:Family Members Of EU/EEA Citizens > Visa Fees 1]
- All Visa Fee charges, VFS service charges and all optional services are to be paid in cash only in Bangladeshi Taka. (Inclusive of VAT)
- Fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden or the represented countries on Visiting Family and Friends, you need the documents as per below checklist.
Family members of EU/EEA citizens - Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/wiM03WfKsT3i8cbtLQfZ1/dee8f69c922ba104005e76453c784d17/Family-Members-Of-EU-EEA-Citizens-Checklist-1.pdf)
English - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6mVFMuxKgZT0s1GiqkpgUb/05c65254111e2f4d2005f9aedf5d35d2/English-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf) or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3pMu3zfQJqZDCSVV3Fcrr7/000c957ea8f3d44458ba7f5b42d2b4b5/Swedish-Sweden-Visa-Application-Form-Dec-25.pdf) - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting. 
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

## Photo Specifications
One [1] photograph of passport style and size [35 x 45 mm] for all applicants, including minors. Your photograph must be:

- colour photo
- recent and of true likeness
- showing full face
- taken without headgear
- head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant's face
- taken against a plain, evenly lit and light background.
- The photograph should not be older than 6 months old.

## Processing Time
Processing normally takes 15 Calendar days, but may in some cases take up to 45 calendar days.

Application form for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6UtBJaKdcztJVAUJzjygdG/986c6238b77ca23e7564df51831da187/application-for-schengen-visa__3_.pdf)
